description:
Streaming overlay studio with widgets, scenes, and integrated streaming.

Crntly is a desktop streaming studio for Twitch, YouTube, and Kick.

Build canvases out of widgets — Twitch chat, alerts, Spotify now-playing,
subscriber goals, viewer counts, custom HTML — and stream them directly
from the app. Scenes, transitions, audio mixing, screen capture, and
game capture are all built in.

Web-based collaboration: invite editors to your canvas, share live
widget URLs, and design once / use everywhere.
